name: arc-cyber-decision-engine
description: ARES turns synthetic cyber evidence into auditable, deterministic response decisions with host-model specialist reasoning and no OpenAI API key.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-backed cyber decisions without API keys
interface.longDescription: Use ARES in Codex to investigate synthetic cyber incidents, compare response options with deterministic scoring, convene eight specialist perspectives, and produce a citation-complete DecisionBundle. The local MCP server performs no live security actions and requires no external credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use ARES to investigate the finance OAuth scenario
Use ARES to compare the safest containment options
